PLAINTIFF IS GRANTED 30 DAYS FROM TODAY TO TO FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT ALLEGING PURPORTEDLY NON-ARBITRABLE CLAIMS BUT MUST GIVE DATES AS TO WHEN THOSE CLAIMS ACCRUED. MOTION - Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Action Pending Arbitration
Off Calendar Jul-27-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Seong Kim, Esq.and Rebecca Edelson. Esq. 310-228-3700 of Sheppard Mullin Richter & Hampton LLP for Plaintiff.
David Bate, Esq. 310-348-2907 of Bate & Bate LLP for Defendant GEOFFREY PALERMO, GMP MANAGEMENT, INC.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANTS GMP MANAGEMENT, INC. AND GEOFFREY M. PALERMO'S Motion To Stay Action Pending Arbitration.

Granted. Plaintiff is granted 30 days from today to to file an amended complaint alleging purportedly non-arbitrable claims but must give dates as to when those claims accrued. Defendants may respond to the amended complaint including but not limited to filing another motion for stay, and or motion to compel arbitration.

Defendant to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
